basic_details.job_title: Prasar Bharati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Correspondent, Senior Correspondent Posts
basic_details.short_information: Prasar Bharati has released the official Correspondent, Senior Correspondent Notification 2026 on its official website under Advertisement No. E340313 A-10/016/30/2026-TM&SO. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced for the Prasar Bharati Correspondent/Senior Correspondent Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged below 40 years for Correspondent posts and below 45 years for Senior Correspondent posts, with a qualification of Degree or PG Diploma in Journalism/Mass Communication or a relevant field, can apply online within 15 days from the date of publication on the Prasar Bharati website.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 15 days From the date of publlcatlon on PB Website
important_dates.application deadline: 15 days From the date of publlcatlon on PB Website

age_limit.age_details: Correspondent: Below 40 years. Senior Correspondent: Below 45 years.
age_limit.details: Correspondent: Below 40 years. Senior Correspondent: Below 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/PG Diploma in Journalism/Mass Communication/relevant field.
qualification.details: Correspondent: Degree/ PG Diploma in Journalism/ Mass Communication/ relevant field. Proficiency in Hindi and English. Proficiency in respective regional language for RNU, Imphal. Hindi and knowledge of English is desirable for RNU, Lucknow, Varanasi and Dehradun. At least 5 years' experience in relevant field. Senior Correspondent: Degree/ PG Diploma in Journalism/ Mass Communication/ relevant field. Bilingual in Hindi & English. Proficiency in the respective regional language. At least 7 years' experience in relevant field.

salary_details.details: Correspondent: Negotiable between ₹ 60,000 – 80,000/- Senior Correspondent: Negotiable between ₹ 80,000 – 1,25,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Prasar Bharati Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Prasar Bharati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Prasar Bharati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Prasar Bharati Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Correspondent: Degree/ PG Diploma in Journalism/ Mass Communication/ relevant field. Proficiency in Hindi and English. Proficiency in respective regional language for RNU, Imphal. Hindi and knowledge of English is desirable for RNU, Lucknow, Varanasi and Dehradun. At least 5 years' experience in relevant field. Senior Correspondent: Degree/ PG Diploma in Journalism/ Mass Communication/ relevant field. Bilingual in Hindi & English. Proficiency in the respective regional language. At least 7 years' experience in relevant field.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Prasar Bharati Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend

rows.date: 15 days From the date of publlcatlon on PB Website

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Prasar Bharati Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Prasar Bharati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Prasar Bharati Correspondent/Senior Correspondent posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Prasar Bharati Correspondent/Senior Correspondent posts is 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Correspondent and Senior Correspondent posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies, with 4 for Correspondent and 1 for Senior Correspondent.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Degree or PG Diploma in Journalism, Mass Communication, or a relevant field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Correspondent post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Correspondent post is below 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Senior Correspondent post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Senior Correspondent post is below 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Correspondent post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Correspondent post is negotiable between ₹ 60,000 to ₹ 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Senior Correspondent post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Correspondent post is negotiable between ₹ 80,000 to ₹ 1,25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Prasar Bharati recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official Prasar Bharati website before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for these posts.
